requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Regulation, Labelling and Producer Responsibility — Kenya vs EU-style Battery Law
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项法规、标签与生产者责任——肯尼亚与欧盟式电池法对比
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項法規、標籤與生產者責任——肯亞與歐盟式電池法對比

summary.en: Kenya has no single horizontal battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 — there is no Battery Passport, no carbon footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no critical-mineral (cobalt/lithium/nickel/graphite) supply-chain due-diligence law for imported portable batteries. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks are regulated as products under the Standards Act (Cap 496) and are subject to the KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards programme: a regulated import must obtain a KEBS Certificate of Conformity (CoC) before shipment and carry the Import Standardization Mark (ISM). The applicable Kenya Standards (KS) adopt the IEC series (KS IEC 62133 for cell/pack safety; KS for marking and capacity). General environmental and end-of-life handling falls under the Environmental Management and Co-ordination Act (EMCA) and NEMA e-waste/extended-producer-responsibility regulations, which target in-country handlers and importers rather than imposing EU-style battery passport or carbon-footprint duties on the foreign manufacturer.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚没有等同于欧盟电池法规2023/1542的单一横向电池法规——没有电池护照、碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛，也没有针对进口便携式电池的关键矿产（钴/锂/镍/石墨）供应链尽职调查法律。锂电池和移动电源作为产品受《标准法》（Cap 496）规制，并须纳入KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划：受管制进口品在装运前须取得KEBS符合性证书（CoC）并加施进口标准化标志（ISM）。适用的肯尼亚标准（KS）采用IEC系列（电芯/电池组安全适用KS IEC 62133；标识与容量适用相应KS）。一般环境与报废处理由《环境管理与协调法》（EMCA）及NEMA电子废弃物/生产者延伸责任法规管辖，其对象为本地处理方和进口商，而非对境外制造商施加欧盟式电池护照或碳足迹义务。
summary.zht: 肯亞沒有等同於歐盟電池法規2023/1542的單一橫向電池法規——沒有電池護照、碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻，也沒有針對進口便攜式電池的關鍵礦產（鈷/鋰/鎳/石墨）供應鏈盡職調查法律。鋰電池和行動電源作為產品受《標準法》（Cap 496）規制，並須納入KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計劃：受管制進口品在裝運前須取得KEBS符合性證書（CoC）並加施進口標準化標誌（ISM）。適用的肯亞標準（KS）採用IEC系列（電芯/電池組安全適用KS IEC 62133；標識與容量適用相應KS）。一般環境與報廢處理由《環境管理與協調法》（EMCA）及NEMA電子廢棄物/生產者延伸責任法規管轄，其對象為本地處理方和進口商，而非對境外製造商施加歐盟式電池護照或碳足跡義務。

standards_or_laws: Standards Act (Cap 496, Laws of Kenya) — KEBS mandate for product standards and conformity
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards programme — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) and Import Standardization Mark (ISM)
Environmental Management and Co-ordination Act (EMCA) and NEMA e-waste / extended-producer-responsibility regulations — domestic end-of-life handling

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent single battery regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), customs import/export declaration, and for certain rechargeable battery products mandatory CCC certification under the CNCA catalogue. China's own producer-responsibility scheme for waste batteries (Solid Waste Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures) applies domestically and is structurally different from Kenya's NEMA e-waste framework. There is no Chinese equivalent of a battery passport, carbon footprint declaration, or critical-mineral due-diligence law for battery exporters.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应的单一电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，部分可充电电池产品还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国自身的废旧电池生产者责任制度（《固体废物法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》）属国内要求，在结构上与肯尼亚NEMA电子废弃物框架不同。中国没有等同于电池护照、碳足迹声明或电池出口商关键矿产尽职调查的法律。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應的單一電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，部分可充電電池產品還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國自身的廢舊電池生產者責任制度（《固體廢物法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》）屬國內要求，在結構上與肯亞NEMA電子廢棄物框架不同。中國沒有等同於電池護照、碳足跡聲明或電池出口商關鍵礦產盡職調查的法律。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Kenya imposes no battery passport, carbon footprint, recycled-content, or critical-mineral due-diligence obligation on the foreign manufacturer — the dominant gap for a Chinese exporter is procedural, not horizontal-regulatory: a regulated lithium battery / power bank cannot clear Kenyan customs without a KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity issued before shipment, plus the Import Standardization Mark (ISM). GB 31241 / CCC documentation does not establish PVoC conformity; the exporter (or its in-country importer) must enrol the consignment in PVoC through an appointed inspection body, present test evidence to the applicable KS (IEC-based), and obtain the CoC per shipment or under a registered/licensed route. End-of-life duties under EMCA/NEMA fall on the Kenyan importer, but the exporter should confirm marking and capacity labelling meet the relevant KS.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，肯尼亚不对境外制造商施加电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或关键矿产尽职调查义务——中国出口商的主要差距是程序性的，而非横向法规性的：受管制的锂电池/移动电源若无装运前签发的KEBS PVoC符合性证书及进口标准化标志（ISM），无法在肯尼亚通关。GB 31241/CCC文件不能证明PVoC符合性；出口商（或其本地进口商）须经指定检验机构将货物纳入PVoC，按适用KS（基于IEC）提交测试证据，并按每批货物或注册/许可路径取得CoC。EMCA/NEMA下的报废义务由肯尼亚进口商承担，但出口商应确认标识与容量标签符合相关KS。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，肯亞不對境外製造商施加電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或關鍵礦產盡職調查義務——中國出口商的主要差距是程序性的，而非橫向法規性的：受管制的鋰電池/行動電源若無裝運前簽發的KEBS PVoC符合性證書及進口標準化標誌（ISM），無法在肯亞通關。GB 31241/CCC文件不能證明PVoC符合性；出口商（或其本地進口商）須經指定檢驗機構將貨物納入PVoC，按適用KS（基於IEC）提交測試證據，並按每批貨物或註冊/許可路徑取得CoC。EMCA/NEMA下的報廢義務由肯亞進口商承擔，但出口商應確認標識與容量標籤符合相關KS。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity and Import Standardization Mark are required before Kenyan customs clearance for regulated lithium batteries / power banks under the Standards Act (Cap 496); there is no EU-style battery passport, carbon footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence obligation on the foreign manufacturer; EMCA/NEMA e-waste duties apply to in-country handlers/importers
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; no battery passport, carbon footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence law applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards programme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya has no horizontal EU-style battery regulation; the binding gap for Chinese exporters is the KEBS PVoC route — a Certificate of Conformity obtained before shipment plus the Import Standardization Mark, assessed against KS (IEC-based) standards. Battery passport, carbon footprint, recycled content, and critical-mineral due diligence are NOT Kenyan requirements. GB 31241 / CCC does not satisfy PVoC. End-of-life obligations under EMCA/NEMA rest with the Kenyan importer, not the foreign manufacturer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚没有横向的欧盟式电池法规；中国出口商面临的约束性差距是KEBS PVoC路径——装运前取得的符合性证书加进口标准化标志，依据KS（基于IEC）标准评定。电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量及关键矿产尽职调查均非肯尼亚要求。GB 31241/CCC不能满足PVoC。EMCA/NEMA下的报废义务由肯尼亚进口商承担，而非境外制造商。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞沒有橫向的歐盟式電池法規；中國出口商面臨的約束性差距是KEBS PVoC路徑——裝運前取得的符合性證書加進口標準化標誌，依據KS（基於IEC）標準評定。電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量及關鍵礦產盡職調查均非肯亞要求。GB 31241/CCC不能滿足PVoC。EMCA/NEMA下的報廢義務由肯亞進口商承擔，而非境外製造商。
